name: makrellts
description: TypeScript implementation of the Makrell language family, including MakrellTS, browser tooling, and MRTD helpers.

scripts.sync: bun run sync:assets && bun run sync:playground
scripts.build: bun run sync && bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/cli.ts ./src/editor_assets.ts ./src/playground.ts --outdir dist --target bun --sourcemap
scripts.build:browser: bun run sync && bun build ./src/browser.ts ./src/meta_worker.ts --outdir dist/browser --target browser --format esm --sourcemap
scripts.typecheck: bun run sync && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.json
scripts.test:browser: bun run build && bun run build:browser && bun run scripts/test-browser-smoke.ts
scripts.ci: bun run build && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run test:browser
